title: Pakistan confirms Iran’s response to US proposal to end war
content:

“Right now, the Field Marshal [Asim Munir] informed me that [we have] received Iran’s response. I cannot go further into details,” the prime minister told the audience at an event to mark Marka-e-Haq in Islamabad.
